tagline: Turn irregular bills into calm cash flow.

designSystem.style: Dark glassmorphic with teal-sky gradient accents. Calm, clinical, and trustworthy aesthetic — soft glows instead of harsh borders. Balance indicators use semantic color zones (green/amber/red) to communicate financial stress visually. Typography is heavy (800–900 weight) for balances and actions to convey confidence and clarity.

screens: Home — Balance overview, mini cash flow chart, 3 micro-actions, upcoming bills preview
Forecast — Full 14-day SVG cash flow chart with colored risk zones, income predictions with probability bars, key date timeline
Bills — Bill list with Fixed/Semi-flex/Flexible tags, filter tabs, paid toggle, urgency warnings
Calm Plan — Breathing activation toggle, 5 prioritized actions with progress bar, outcome summary
Profile — Avatar, income sources with linked status, settings toggles
keyInteractions: Micro-action completion with tap-to-confirm CTA buttons
Calm mode breathing animation (scale pulse every 4s)
Bill flexibility filter tabs with smooth active state
Calm plan step checkboxes with progress bar
Tab navigation with scale press feedback
